hero.title: Vision & Mission abc
hero.subtitle: Guided by Edmund Rice values for nearly a century

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.quote: To be a beacon of educational excellence, nurturing compassionate leaders who transform communities through knowledge, service, and unwavering commitment to justice.

points.title: Academic Excellence
points.description: To be recognized as a premier educational institution setting the highest standards in academic achievement.

points.title: Character Formation
points.description: Develop individuals of integrity, compassion, and moral courage who contribute positively to society.

points.title: Global Citizens
points.description: Nurture students who think globally, act locally, and embrace diversity in an interconnected world.

points.title: Innovation & Leadership
points.description: Foster creative thinking, entrepreneurial spirit, and ethical leadership in all students.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide holistic education rooted in Edmund Rice values, fostering academic excellence, character formation, and global citizenship in a nurturing, inclusive community that empowers students to serve humanity with distinction.

pillars.title: Quality Education
pillars.description: Comprehensive, innovative education that challenges students intellectually and prepares them for higher learning.

pillars.title: Inclusive Community
pillars.description: A welcoming, diverse environment where every student feels valued and empowered to reach their potential.

pillars.title: Edmund Rice Values
pillars.description: Core values of compassion, justice, respect, and liberation through daily practices and education.

pillars.title: Holistic Development
pillars.description: Nurture intellectual, emotional, physical, social, and spiritual growth through comprehensive programs.

coreValues.title: Core Values
coreValues.description: The foundational principles that guide every aspect of our educational mission.

values.title: Compassion
values.description: Teaching empathy, kindness, and care for others in all relationships.

values.title: Justice
values.description: Promoting fairness, equality, and courage to stand up for what is right.

values.title: Respect
values.description: Honoring the dignity of every individual and celebrating diversity.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: Striving for the highest standards in all endeavors and continuous improvement.

callToAction.title: Join Our Educational Community
callToAction.description: Experience education that combines academic excellence with strong values and character formation.
